g.text: vendor cost comparison for 1,000 questions on March 25, 2026
1 search per question and 3 page opens per question
Serper row excludes your own crawl infra cost because open_url runs
Brave Search API Search: $5 per 1k requests
Tavily basic search: 1 credit per search at $0.008 per credit
Tavily basic extract: 1 credit per 5 successful extractions
